translation.en: I will try to learn Vietnamese.

notes_md:
**cố gắng** = to try, to make an effort. It’s about putting in effort, even when something is hard.

It’s a verb and usually comes before another verb to show what you’re trying to do.  

You’ll also see **cố gắng hết sức** = try your best / give it your all.  

Close synonym: **nỗ lực** (more formal, stronger effort).  
Opposite idea: **bỏ cuộc** (give up).
notes:
cố gắng = to try, to make an effort. It’s about putting in effort, even when something is hard.

It’s a verb and usually comes before another verb to show what you’re trying to do.  

You’ll also see cố gắng hết sức = try your best / give it your all.  

Close synonym: nỗ lực (more formal, stronger effort).  
Opposite idea: bỏ cuộc (give up).
exampleSentences: Anh sẽ cố gắng hoàn thành công việc trước khi về nhà.
Chị luôn cố gắng học tiếng Anh mỗi ngày để tiến bộ hơn.
Em đã cố gắng hết sức trong kỳ thi vừa rồi.

translation.en: I will try to learn Vietnamese.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will try to finish the work before going home.
She always try to study English every day to improve.
I try my best in the recent exam.

definitions.vi: Nỗ lực để đạt được điều gì đó.
definitions.es: Hacer un esfuerzo para lograr algo.
definitions.en: To make an effort to achieve something.

example.en: I will try to study better.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ cố gắng học tốt hơn.
